antiPhishing.currentDescription: This code is displayed in platform emails to help identify authentic messages.

antiPhishing.description: Manage the custom code shown in outbound emails so staff can verify legitimate platform mail.

antiPhishing.explainer: Use a short internal phrase that staff can recognize instantly and attackers cannot guess.

validation.antiPhishingRequired: Enter an anti-phishing code before saving.
validation.antiPhishingTooLong: Anti-phishing code must be 50 characters or fewer.

overview.description: Operate active sessions, 2FA, anti-phishing controls, and baseline account hardening from one operator surface.

guidance.moderate: Trust posture is acceptable, but at least one hardening layer is still missing or too broad.
guidance.strong: Trust posture is strong. Focus on keeping sessions tight and rotating secrets only when operationally necessary.
guidance.weak: Trust posture is weak. Enable 2FA, set anti-phishing, and reduce excess sessions first.

overview.identityDescription: Core account facts for this admin operator.

routes.antiPhishing: Manage the verification code shown in outbound emails.
routes.posture: Review trust signals and rotate the account password.

overview.signalsDescription: Real-time signals pulled from account session state and security primitives.
overview.title: Security Control

posture.description: Review trust signals for this admin identity and rotate the password when posture needs improvement.

guidance.moderate: This account is serviceable but still missing at least one trust layer or has too many active sessions.
guidance.secondary: Keep privileged accounts on unique passwords, active 2FA, and the smallest session footprint practical for operations.
guidance.strong: This account is well hardened. Keep session count low and rotate credentials on planned intervals or incident triggers.
guidance.weak: This account needs immediate hardening. Enable 2FA, add anti-phishing, and rotate the password after cleaning sessions.

posture.passwordDescription: Use this form to rotate the current admin password after validation.

twoFactor.description: Provision, validate, and disable TOTP-based 2FA for the current admin account.

twoFactor.notesDescription: Keep 2FA enabled for every privileged account. Disable only for controlled recovery procedures.
twoFactor.provisioningDescription: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app, then verify with a live TOTP code.
twoFactor.recoveryDescription: Store these codes securely. They are shown here once after disable completes.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Re-authenticate with your password before generating a fresh TOTP secret.
twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Control
twoFactor.validateDescription: Check that the authenticator currently generates a valid code.

detail.recoveryDescription: Rotate customer credentials, issue a temporary password, and optionally clear every registered mobile device in the same recovery run.
detail.recoveryProtocolDescription: Use a manual password when support already verified the next credential with the customer. Use a temporary password for controlled takeover recovery, then share it through an approved secure channel.

changelog.empty: No recent updates for this architecture.
changelog.title: LATEST DIRECTIVES

Features.description: Military-grade encryption algorithms and quantum-resistant infrastructure. Explore the modular components that protect your digital existence.

killswitch.description: Constantly monitors the encrypted tunnel integrity. If the connection drops for a microsecond, all external traffic is physically severed at the OS level to prevent IP leaks.
specs: Level: OS Kernel space routing rules
killswitch.subtitle: System-Level Isolation
killswitch.title: Neural Kill Switch

multihop.description: Your traffic is fragmented, encrypted, and routed through multiple sovereign jurisdictions. Even if one node is compromised, your origin remains mathematical impossible to trace.
multihop.subtitle: Distributed Node Routing
multihop.title: Multi-Hop Cascading

obfuscation.description: Bypasses Deep Packet Inspection in highly restricted environments (China, Iran). VPN traffic is steganographically disguised as standard HTTPS web traffic.
obfuscation.subtitle: DPI Evasion Engine
obfuscation.title: Shadow Obfuscation

quantum.description: Prepared for the cryptographic apocalypse. Utilizes lattice-based algorithms to secure handshakes against quantum decryption attacks before they happen.
specs: Threat Model: Harvest Now, Decrypt Later
quantum.subtitle: Post-Quantum Cryptography
quantum.title: Quantum Resistance

items.desc: RAM-only servers. Rebooted daily. Data never touches a hard drive.
items.title: Strict No-Logs Policy

items.desc: Protect your entire arsenal of hardware with a single access key.
items.title: 10 Simultaneous Devices

items.desc: DNS-level filtering neutralizes malicious scripts before they load.
items.title: Ad & Tracker Blocker

items.desc: Dedicated high-bandwidth nodes specifically hardware-accelerated for torrenting.
items.title: P2P Optimized

Features.title: Core Capabilities

Footer.brandDescription: Advanced privacy protection infrastructure for the next generation of the internet. Navigate the digital void with military-grade encryption.

newsletter.description: Join our encrypted frequency. Get updates on server locations, security protocols, and zero-day patches.

HelpCenter.faq_billing_1_a: You can acquire additional Access Credits via the Billing terminal using supported crypto or fiat gateways.
HelpCenter.faq_billing_1_q: How do I increase my bandwidth quota?
HelpCenter.faq_billing_2_a: Refunds are processed strictly within the first 72 hours of establishing a new connection cycle.
HelpCenter.faq_billing_2_q: Are refunds available for inactive cycles?
HelpCenter.faq_billing_3_a: Affirmative. We accept Monero (XMR), USDT, and Bitcoin for completely untraceable transactions.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_1_a: Download the CyberVPN core module for your OS, authenticate with your Neural ID, and click 'Engage'.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_1_q: How do I initialize my first connection?
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_2_a: The network accepts connections from Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android clients via standard Xray/Sing-box protocols.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_3_a: Yes, depending on your Access Credit tier, you can link up to 10 concurrent neural pathways.
HelpCenter.faq_getting_started_3_q: Can I connect multiple devices simultaneously?
HelpCenter.faq_intro: Browse initialization, routing, billing, and security answers without waiting for client hydration.
HelpCenter.faq_security_1_a: Negative. All databanks are volatile. We operate on a strict zero-knowledge architecture.
HelpCenter.faq_security_2_a: We utilize ChaCha20-Poly1305 and AES-256-GCM ciphers, providing military-grade cryptographic integrity.
HelpCenter.faq_security_3_a: Yes. If the secure tunnel drops, the client immediately terminates all external network adapters to prevent IP leaks.
HelpCenter.faq_security_3_q: Do you offer a Kill Switch?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_1_a: Check your node's ping. If packet loss exceeds 5%, reroute to an alternate shard in the Server Grid.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_1_q: Why is my connection speed degraded?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_2_a: The system automatically engages fallback routing. If manual override is needed, flush your DNS cache and reconnect.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_2_q: What if the primary proxy fails?
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_3_a: Our core utilizing VLESS+Reality automatically masks your traffic as standard HTTPS. Ensure you have the latest core update applied.
HelpCenter.faq_troubleshooting_3_q: How do I bypass DPI restrictions?
HelpCenter.meta_description: Access the databanks for troubleshooting, guides, and secure communication channels.

features.sectionSubtitle: Six layers of defense engineered for the modern cyber-citizen

stealth.desc: Traffic is indistinguishable from visiting Google/Microsoft/Apple. No VPN fingerprinting.

hero.subtitle: Bypass DPI blocking of any complexity. Masquerade traffic as standard HTTPS. Up to 10 Gbps speeds without encapsulation loss.
hero.title: INVISIBLE VPN. POWERED BY VLESS-REALITY

how_it_works.desc: Your ISP sees a request to microsoft.com or google.com. They don't see an encrypted tunnel. They see a normal user browsing the web. Access granted. Includes intelligent transport selection—automatically failing over to XHTTP if non-standard protocols are blocked.
how_it_works.title: How Reality Works

faq.a1: Negative. We operate on a strict Zero-Log infrastructure. Your digital footprint is erased upon disconnection.
faq.a2: Your connection will drop to baseline throttled speeds (128 kbps). Upgrade to Pro for unlimited transmission.

faq.q2: What happens if I exceed the Stealth tier bandwidth?

basic.description: Essential encryption for navigating the digital outer rims.
basic.name: STEALTH

elite.description: Full network override. Dedicated IPs and total infrastructure control.
elite.name: ELITE_SYNC

pro.description: Unrestricted speed and matrix-level anonymity for true runners.
pro.name: CYBER_PRO

dataCollection.content: To maintain the protocol protocol, we require an absolute minimum of information. We collect only: authorization credentials (password hash) and subscription metadata (token expiration date).
dataCollection.title: 02. DATA COLLECTION

encryption.content: Your traffic is protected by AES-256-GCM standard with Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS). This means that even if a future quantum computer breaks the current key, your past sessions will remain secure.
encryption.title: 04. CRYPTOGRAPHY

introduction.content: This document represents the official Privacy Policy of the CyberVPN network. Our core principle is simple: we cannot surrender what we do not possess. We have engineered an infrastructure that is physically incapable of storing your personal data, activity logs, or browsing history.
introduction.title: 01. INTRODUCTION & OVERVIEW

noLogs.content: Our entire network operates on RAM disks (volatile memory). The moment a server is rebooted, any traces of your presence are irretrievably destroyed. We do not keep DNS query logs, IP addresses, or session timestamps.
noLogs.title: 03. ZERO-LOGS POLICY

thirdParties.content: CyberVPN does not share, sell, or trade your data. We do not cooperate with advertising networks or data brokers. Our sole source of income is the subscription fees paid by our users.
thirdParties.title: 05. THIRD PARTIES

meta.description: CyberVPN's privacy policy covering data collection, no-log policy, GDPR rights, and data security practices.
meta.title: Privacy Policy - CyberVPN

changes.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date.
changes.title: Changes to This Policy

contact.intro: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us:
contact.title: Contact Information

dataCollection.intro: CyberVPN collects minimal data necessary to provide our VPN service:

items.deviceInfo: Device and connection metadata (device type, operating system)
items.paymentInfo: Payment information (processed securely by third-party providers)
items.usageStats: Aggregate usage statistics (bandwidth usage, connection duration)

dataCollection.title: Data Collection

dataRetention.description: We retain data only as long as necessary:

policies.accountData: Account data: retained while your account is active
policies.deletedAccounts: Deleted account data: permanently erased within 30 days
policies.paymentRecords: Payment records: 7 years for legal compliance
policies.supportLogs: Support logs: 90 days after ticket closure

dataRetention.title: Data Retention

measures.encryption: End-to-end encryption for all VPN traffic
measures.regularAudits: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments

security.title: Security Posture

classified.text1: Our [OBFUSCATION] algorithms were engineered by former [REDACTED] architects, allowing our traffic to blend seamlessly with the background noise of the internet.
classified.text2: In the event of a physical server seizure, the [CONTAGION PROTOCOL] automatically zero-fills all disk arrays [REDACTED].
classified.title: TOP SECRET

Security.description: ABSOLUTE PROTECTION. INITIALIZING PROTOCOLS OF BLISSFUL IGNORANCE...

bareMetal.description: We utilize exclusively leased bare-metal servers. No VPS neighbors. Memory operates in RAM-only mode (Tails-like architecture), completely annihilating all data upon power cycle.
bareMetal.title: 01. BARE METAL TIER

client.description: Open-source applications subjected to rigorous independent audits. Embedded Network Lock (Kill Switch) instantly severs traffic upon the slightest loss of core connection.
client.title: 04. CLIENT TIER

crypto.description: AES-256-GCM cipher with Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) via ECDHE (Curve25519) key exchange. Even if math breaks tomorrow, yesterday's traffic remains illegible.
crypto.title: 03. CRYPTOGRAPHY

network.description: Complex Anycast DNS and traffic obfuscation engine. Your packets are masked as standard HTTPS traffic (TLS 1.3), rendering the VPN connection invisible to state firewalls (DPI).
network.title: 02. NETWORK TIER

Security.title: ENCRYPTION CORE

Terms.description: CRITICAL CLEARANCE: TERMS OF SERVICE. AWAITING ACKNOWLEDGMENT...

acceptance.content: By utilizing the CyberVPN infrastructure, you are initiating a binding cybernetic contract. Access to our communication nodes (Servers) is granted strictly on the condition of unconditional acceptance of these Directives. If your protocols do not agree with the terms, terminate your connection immediately.
acceptance.title: 01. AGREEMENT INITIALIZATION

liability.content: You bear sole responsibility for the data packets transmitted through our network. To the maximum extent permitted by law, CyberVPN shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental damages, loss of profits, or systemic failures resulting from the use of our infrastructure.
liability.title: 04. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

prohibited.content: The CyberVPN network was engineered to bypass censorship and protect digital identities, not to inflict damage upon other systems. The following traffic patterns are strictly prohibited at the hardware layer:
prohibited.title: 02. PATTERN LOCKDOWN

service.content: While our infrastructure is designed for maximum resilience (99.9% uptime), we provide access on an "as-is" basis. We reserve the right to offline, migrate, or upgrade any communication nodes without prior notification to ensure the aggregate security of the matrix.
service.title: 03. WARRANTIES & UPTIME

termination.content: We reserve the right to instantly, without explanation or prior notice, terminate your access token if our neural networks or administrators detect a violation of Section 02 (Pattern Lockdown). Funds for the remaining subscription period will not be refunded in such events.
termination.title: 05. TERMINATION PROTOCOL

Terms.title: SYSTEM DIRECTIVES
